parameters.query: SELECT id, coin, direction, entry_price, position_size_usdt, position_size_units, current_stop, initial_stop, trailing_atr_mult, trail_activation_pct, trailing_activated, highest_since_entry, lowest_since_entry, exchange_order_id FROM trades WHERE status = 'open'

UPDATE trades SET status = 'closed', exit_price = $2, exit_time = NOW(), exit_reason = 'trailing_stop', pnl_usdt = $3, pnl_pct = $4, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1;
SELECT update_portfolio_after_trade($3, $5, $6);

parameters.text:
={{ ($('Calculate PnL').first().json.isWin ? '💚' : '💔') + ' *Obchod uzavřen — Trailing Stop*

' + ($('Calculate PnL').first().json.direction === 'long' ? '🟢' : '🔴') + ' ' + $('Calculate PnL').first().json.coin + ' ' + $('Calculate PnL').first().json.direction.toUpperCase() + '
Entry: `' + $('Calculate PnL').first().json.entry_price + '` → Exit: `' + $('Calculate PnL').first().json.exitPrice.toFixed(8) + '`
P&L: ' + ($('Calculate PnL').first().json.pnlUsdt >= 0 ? '+' : '') + '$' + $('Calculate PnL').first().json.pnlUsdt.toFixed(2) + ' (' + ($('Calculate PnL').first().json.pnlPct >= 0 ? '+' : '') + ($('Calculate PnL').first().json.pnlPct * 100).toFixed(2) + '%)' }}

parameters.query: UPDATE trades SET current_stop = $2, trailing_activated = true, highest_since_entry = COALESCE($3, highest_since_entry), lowest_since_entry = COALESCE($4, lowest_since_entry), last_check_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1
UPDATE trades SET last_check_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1
